title: Meaning of IMMOBILIZED_RUNNING
seoDescription: What does it mean to dream of IMMOBILIZED_RUNNING?
introduction: To dream of IMMOBILIZED_RUNNING represents impediment / limitation.
symbolism: This symbol is associated with Earth, Weight, Immobilized Running, Koşmak isteyip koşamayacak kadar ağırlaşmak, Restricted movement.
